summary: Phase 2 ETL Multi-Tier Aggregator testing complete. All 93 tests pass including Phase 1 (18 tests), Phase 2 (38 tests), API tests (35 tests), and SOCIB THREDDS tests (2 tests).
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper separation of concerns between fetchers, orchestrators, and pipeline
datetime.utcnow() correctly fixed to datetime.now(timezone.utc) in socib_thredds.py
ECMWF resolution correctly set to 9.0 km in ATMOSPHERIC_PROVIDERS
All fetchers properly implement dry_run mode for testing without API credentials
Proper error handling with fallback chain in tier selection
test_credentials: No credentials required - all fetchers use dry_run=True mode
seed_data_creation: None required - tests use mocked/dry_run data
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a pure Python ETL/data pipeline project in /app/humanintheloop/. Run tests with: cd /app/humanintheloop && python -m pytest <test_files> -v. All 93 tests pass. Phase 2 adds atmospheric fetchers (Météo-France, AEMET, ECMWF), Puertos del Estado observations, wind loader, and pipeline orchestrator. All APIs are MOCKED via dry_run=True since no real API credentials are available.

phase_1_tests.test_decision_engine.py: 5 tests - captain knowledge, departure windows, lineage context

phase_2_tests.test_fetchers.py: 13 tests - Météo-France, AEMET, ECMWF fetchers and tier integration
phase_2_tests.test_puertos_estado.py: 8 tests - station config, observation normalization, dry_run, lineage
phase_2_tests.test_ingest_observations.py: 6 tests - SOCIB integration, Puertos enabled/disabled, lineage
phase_2_tests.test_wind_loader.py: 5 tests - variable normalization, coord renaming, wind speed/direction
phase_2_tests.test_pipeline.py: 6 tests - run_id generation, step functions, snapshot lineage

api_tests.test_route_analysis.py: 8 tests - route point series, passage evidence
api_tests.test_api_app.py: 27 tests - routes, questions, briefings, artifacts, maps endpoints
